headline: The Whisper That Moved A Half-Trillion Dollar Stock
summary: Applied Materials didn't need to release earnings to add billions in value; all it took was a single Wall Street firm changing its tune.

headline: Applied Materials Stock Is Priced For Perfection
summary: After a historic run, the biggest threat to the chip-equipment giant isn't a lack of demand but the immense difficulty of executing flawlessly when expectations are this high.

raw.headline: Applied Materials Stock Is Priced For Perfection
raw.summary: After a historic run, the biggest threat to the chip-equipment giant isn't a lack of demand but the immense difficulty of executing flawlessly when expectations are this high.

headline: Texas Instruments (TXN) Drops From Value Indexes And Joins Russell Top 50
summary: Texas Instruments (NasdaqGS:TXN) has been removed from several value and defensive indexes as part of recent benchmark reconstitutions. The stock has been added to the Russell 1000 Dynamic and Top 50 indexes, reshaping its index profile across style and broad market benchmarks. These changes may influence how institutional and passive funds gain exposure to Texas Instruments, as index-linked mandates adjust holdings over time. Texas Instruments enters this reshuffle with a recent share...

headline: Monolithic Power Systems shares are trading higher after Stifel maintained its Buy rating on the stock and raised its price target from $1300 to $1500.

headline: TXN's Inventory Strategy Pays Off: Can It Support More Growth?
summary: Texas Instruments' inventory build fuels faster deliveries and revenue growth as industrial and data center demand rebounds. Can it sustain the momentum?
